RewardMeaningText: The Greedy Path rips the biggest mana_shard haul out of Dungeon Beta's raider vault for City B's processors.
CityImpactMeaningText: Restarts refined_mana quickly, but the vault raid leaves the next dispatch under heavier recovery strain.
RecommendationShiftText: Processing can restart immediately, but City B should avoid chaining another high-strain push right after the raid.
